publicFilterSpecError: Error occurred when trying to fetch public filter specification
title: Title
illegalTitle: Title contains non ASCII or forbidden character: ({illegalChars})
illegalText: Text contains non ASCII or forbidden character: ({illegalChars})
filteredExpandEmpty: Indexed expand with filter returned no data. Defaulting to authored expand without filter.
dataIsTooLarge: Close panel and retry with a smaller data set.
expandDataNotIndexed: data is not indexed yet, use Authoring mode instead or restart command after indexation.
doYouWantToRemoveMulti: Do you want to remove the selected objects
removeRestriction: To add again, you will need to close the dialog box, select the required objects, and click New Branch.
autoDisableDrw: The option to include all drawings have automatically been turned off.
goToPreviousShortDesc: If needed, scrolls or expands the structure to focus on the previous related object
goToNextShortDesc: If needed, scrolls or expands the structure to focus on the next related object
autoSelectShortDesc: Click again to deselect all highlighted objects
resetShortDesc: Deselects the selected objects and clears the highlighted objects
